phrases.text_local: Pode me dizer onde fica a escadaria Nicolau Nasoni?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH nee-koo-LOW nuh-zoo-NEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira, eles podem indicar a escadaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH shkuh-duh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office, they can show you the staircase.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office, they can show you the staircase.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH shkuh-duh-REEUH.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira, eles podem indicar a escadaria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 360° viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro de trezentos e sessenta graus?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka oo mi-ra-DOO-roo jee-tre-ZEN-toosh ee-ses-SEN-ta GRA-oosh
phrases.cultural_note: Offers panoramic views of Porto and the Douro River.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no topo da torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO TAW-poo DUH TAW-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is at the top of the tower.

responses.english: Good morning, it is at the top of the tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO TAW-poo DUH TAW-rih.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica no topo da torre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up the audio guide
phrases.text_local: Onde posso levantar o guia de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo leh-vahnng-TAHR AW GEEUH DIH OW-deeoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are distributed before ascending the spiral staircase.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Nicolau Nasoni staircase is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a escadaria do Nicolau Nasoni?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DOO nee-koo-LOW nuh-zoo-NEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Designed by the Italian architect, it is a narrow spiral stairway.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, situa-se no interior da torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH TAW-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is situated inside the tower.

responses.english: Good morning, it is situated inside the tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH TAW-rih.
responses.local: Bom dia, situa-se no interior da torre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide pickup is
phrases.text_local: Onde é o balcão dos guias de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee EH oo bal-SOW dosh GEE-ahs jee-AH-oo-jee-oh (de+áudio link: jee-AH)
phrases.cultural_note: Devices are distributed in Portuguese, English, and Spanish.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, localiza-se junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located next to the ticket counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located next to the ticket counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, localiza-se junto à bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Clérigos Church nave is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a nave da Igreja dos Clérigos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH NAH-vih DUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOOSH KLEH-ree-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The church and tower share the same historic complex.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bell chamber is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a câmara dos sinos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KAHN-muh-ruh DOOSH SEE-noosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Houses the historic bells overlooking the city.

likely_response.local: Siga as escadas de Nicolau Nasoni.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DIH nee-koo-LOW nuh-zoo-NEE.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh DIH nee-koo-LOW nuh-zoo-NEE.
responses.local: Siga as escadas de Nicolau Nasoni.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Clérigos Church nave is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a nave da igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH NAH-vih DUH eeg-REH-zhuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The nave features ornate Baroque decoration and gilded woodwork.

likely_response.local: A nave fica no interior da igreja. Pode pedir indicações a um acolhedor ou ao guia oficial.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH NAH-vih FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH eeg-REH-zhuh. PAW-dih pih-DEER een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH AH OONNG uh-koo-lyih-DOHR OHW OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The nave is inside the church. You can ask an usher or the official guide for directions.

responses.english: The nave is inside the church. You can ask an usher or the official guide for directions.
responses.phonetic: AH NAH-vih FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH eeg-REH-zhuh. PAW-dih pih-DEER een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH AH OONNG uh-koo-lyih-DOHR OHW OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL.
responses.local: A nave fica no interior da igreja. Pode pedir indicações a um acolhedor ou ao guia oficial.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 360° viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma de observação 360°?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN trih-ZAYNG-too-zhee-sih-sayng-tuh°?
phrases.cultural_note: The 360° viewing platform at the top offers panoramic views of Porto.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no topo da torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DUH TAW-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the top of the tower.

responses.english: Good morning, at the top of the tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DUH TAW-rih.
responses.local: Bom dia, no topo da torre.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à câmara do sino?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH KAHN-muh-ruh DOO SEE-noo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a câmara do sino.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAHN-muh-ruh DOO SEE-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the bell chamber.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the bell chamber.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAHN-muh-ruh DOO SEE-noo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a câmara do sino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Baroque azulejo facade is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a fachada de azulejos barrocos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AH fuh-SHAH-duh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh buh-ROH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The tiles depict scenes from the life of Saint Clericus.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está visível na fachada exterior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH vee-ZEE-vehl NUH fuh-SHAH-duh ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is visible on the exterior facade.

responses.english: Good morning, it is visible on the exterior facade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH vee-ZEE-vehl NUH fuh-SHAH-duh ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
responses.local: Bom dia, está visível na fachada exterior.
